title: IBO — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Independent Budget Office (IBO) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to IBO's Open Data fiscal tables (data.cityofnewyork.us), the NYC.gov Content API v2 publication metadata (apps.nyc.gov/content-api/v2/custom-contents/ibo), and the IBO website (www.ibo.nyc.gov, formerly ibo.nyc.ny.us). Includes the fiscal-year spine, a Money type for dollars-in-millions figures, IBO's publication/topic controlled vocabularies, and the NYC geography spine.

Borough.description: NYC borough, or 'Citywide' for aggregate figures (most IBO fiscal series are citywide).

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point (used only by IBO's map-backed interactives, e.g. school/district maps on ibomap.maps.arcgis.com).

Money.description: A monetary figure. IBO fiscal tables are overwhelmingly reported in dollars-in-millions; capture the raw amount and its unit rather than assuming a scale.

unit.description: Scale of the amount. IBO's summary tables use 'millions'.

FiscalYear.description: City fiscal year (ends June 30). IBO series run from FY 1980 (some tax-effort data to 1929) forward; column headers like 'FY 2020' normalize to 2020.

PublicationType.description: IBO publication type ('Publication Type' facet in the Content API). '[p.t.]' suffix stripped.

Topic.description: IBO subject topic ('Topics' facet in the Content API). '[t]' suffix stripped.

Geography.description: NYC geography spine — the join keys back to the rest of city government. Sparsely populated for IBO's citywide fiscal series; used mainly by its school- and district-level analyses.

AgencyReference.description: A NYC agency referenced by an IBO fiscal series (e.g. Agency Expenditures, Full-Time Positions, COVID spending by agency).

agency.description: Agency name as published by IBO.

AgiRange.description: Adjusted Gross Income band ('Income Group') used by IBO's distributional tax and income tables.
